notes.scope: Institution-level rankings linked to each selected program's university.
notes.qs_editions: QS World University Rankings 2023-2027 (latest five available QS editions).
notes.the_editions: THE World University Rankings 2022-2026 (latest five available THE editions).
notes.rank_format: Published rank text is preserved, including ties, bands, and plus signs.
